46.2044° N 6.1432° E
01

Time Redefined

In the silence between seconds, we find our purpose. Each Ballouard timepiece is not merely measured in hours, but in the weight of moments that matter.

B
02
LB
The Weight of Time

Measured in Moments

A Ballouard timepiece does not merely tell time—it holds it. Each component, each polished surface, each precisely calibrated gear exists to capture the intangible: the weight of a glance, the significance of an anniversary, the gravity of a decision.

We reject the notion of disposable luxury. Our watches are conceived as heirlooms, engineered to outlive their makers and carry stories across generations.

03
The Collection

Midnight Caliber

LB
Ref. 001 Midnight Caliber 42mm · 18K Rose Gold
04
35 Pieces Per Year
+2 Master Watchmakers
The Scaling of Mastery

Capacity Expanded

Through the addition of two master watchmakers to our atelier, we have increased our annual production to 35 pieces. This is not a move toward mass production—it is an achievement of capacity.

Each of the 35 timepieces emerging from our workshop each year receives the same meticulous attention, the same hand-finishing, the same dedication to excellence that has defined Ballouard since inception.

2020 Atelier Founded
2024 35 Pieces Capacity
05
The Living Archive

Atelier Log

A visual record of bespoke commissions and in-progress creations. Each piece tells a unique story.

Piece No. 027 Dial Work
Piece No. 031 Movement Assembly
Piece No. 033 In Progress
Piece No. 029 Component
06
Technical Excellence

The Architecture

Caliber Ballouard BM-001
Dimensions 30.00mm × 4.50mm
Components 287
Jewels 42
Power Reserve 72 Hours
Frequency 21,600 vph
07

By Appointment

The atelier welcomes a limited number of visitors each month. Private consultations are arranged exclusively through personal introduction.
